args.content:
# hotfix branch
# Policy: hotfix must include rollback note
#
# Rollback note:
#   To roll back this hotfix, redeploy the previous release tag
#   (the deploy immediately preceding this hotfix) and revert this
#   commit on the hotfix branch. No data migrations are included in
#   this patch, so rollback is safe and does not require a backfill.

# Changelog

## Hotfix

- Apply hotfix patch (see patch.py).
- Rollback: redeploy previous release tag and revert the hotfix commit;
  no data migrations are included, so rollback is safe.
